title: FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources for unpaid relative caregivers. Resources include information about available services, assistance in gaining access to services, individual counseling, support groups, caregiver training, respite care, and supplemental services, on a limited basis. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: -Adult family members or other informal caregivers providing care to individuals 60 years of age and older -Adult family members or other informal caregivers providing care to individuals of any age with Alzheimer’s disease and related disorders -Older relatives (not parents) age 55 and older, providing care to children under the age of 18 -Older relatives, including parents, age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 967-8630 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 967-8630 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, or visit website for more information. Support group information is available by phone or online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Caregiver Counseling Caregiver Training * Kinship Caregivers Caregiver/Care Receiver Support Groups Family Caregiver Subsidies Respite Care Subsidies Specialized Information and Referral * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - STAND BY ME PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBANY OFFICE
